messages.content: # Here is how to fix Error d3dx11_43.dll

## Step 1:
> Download DirectX from Microsoft's official website.
> [**DirectX End-User Runtime Web**](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=35)
## Step 2:
> Update your graphics drivers and restart your PC.
## Step 3:
> Verify your game files on Steam.
> Open Steam > Library > Right Click Assetto Corsa > Properties > Installed Files > Verify Integrity of Game Files
